caption: A man with glasses, a silver-gray wig styled in spikes, and a headset is speaking into a microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. The background is a wall covered in various small framed photographs and pieces of clothing. To his left is a professional black microphone. On-screen graphics appear in the middle of the frame, featuring a logo and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". As the video progresses, the man continues to talk, with slight changes in his facial expression and the position of his mouth and head, while the camera angle and the surrounding environment remain stationary.
